mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_TRX_HISTORY ( TRX_ID, VERSION, OPER_MODE_TYPE, TRX_STOP_YN, TRX_NAME, TRX_DESC, TRX_TYPE, RETRY_TRX_YN, MAX_RETRY_COUNT, RETRY_MI_CYCLE, BIZ_GROUP_ID, BIZDAY_TRX_YN, BIZDAY_TRX_START_TIME, BIZDAY_TRX_END_TIME, SATURDAY_TRX_YN, SATURDAY_TRX_START_TIME, SATURDAY_TRX_END_TIME, HOLIDAY_TRX_YN, HOLIDAY_TRX_START_TIME, HOLIDAY_TRX_END_TIME, TRX_STOP_REASON, HISTORY_REASON ) SELECT TRX_ID, #{version}, OPER_MODE_TYPE, TRX_STOP_YN, TRX_NAME, TRX_DESC, TRX_TYPE, RETRY_TRX_YN, MAX_RETRY_COUNT, RETRY_MI_CYCLE, BIZ_GROUP_ID, BIZDAY_TRX_YN, BIZDAY_TRX_START_TIME, BIZDAY_TRX_END_TIME, SATURDAY_TRX_YN, SATURDAY_TRX_START_TIME, SATURDAY_TRX_END_TIME, HOLIDAY_TRX_YN, HOLIDAY_TRX_START_TIME, HOLIDAY_TRX_END_TIME, TRX_STOP_REASON, #{historyReason} FROM FWK_TRX WHERE TRX_ID = #{trxId}
